name: spaitial-ai
description: Generate and edit explorable 3D Gaussian-splat worlds from a text prompt, image, 360 panorama, or iterative pano edit using the SpAItial API — via the hosted SpAItial MCP server (bring-your-own-key). Create worlds, edit panoramas, check status, download splats, export meshes, and manage your library, then preview them via hosted viewer links.
